queries.question: Show the earliest flight and its departure terminal.
queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, Terminal.terminal_name FROM Terminal JOIN Flight ON Flight.terminal_id = Terminal.id ORDER BY Flight.departure_time ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the departure terminal from each flight.
queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, Terminal.terminal_name FROM Terminal JOIN Flight ON Flight.terminal_id = Terminal.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
}

queries.question: Show the earliest flight and specify what city it is leaving from.
queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, City.name FROM City JOIN Flight ON Flight.origin_city_id = City.id ORDER BY Flight.departure_time ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?name WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasCity_origin_city_id ?city .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the flight and its departure point that departs first.
queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, Terminal.terminal_name, City.name FROM Terminal JOIN Flight ON Flight.terminal_id = Terminal.id JOIN City ON Flight.origin_city_id = City.id ORDER BY Flight.departure_time ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name ?name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?flight p:hasCity_origin_city_id ?city .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the departure terminal and city from each flight.
queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, Terminal.terminal_name,  City.name  FROM Terminal JOIN Flight ON Flight.terminal_id = Terminal.id JOIN City ON Flight.origin_city_id = City.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name ?name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?flight p:hasCity_origin_city_id ?city .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
  ?city p:name ?name .
}

queries.sql: SELECT Flight.flight_number, City.name FROM City JOIN Flight ON Flight.origin_city_id = City.id
queries.sparql:

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show the flight and its departure point that departs first.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?flight_number ?name WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasCity_origin_city_id ?city .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?flight_number ?terminal_name ?name WHERE {
  ?terminal a :Terminals .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasTerminal ?terminal .
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?flight p:hasCity_origin_city_id ?city .
  ?flight p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?terminal p:terminal_name ?terminal_name .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?flight p:departure_time ?departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
